description: Main window. This file governs the Tauri *plugin* surface only, and grants the narrowest form of each: save-dialog + write to the file the dialog returned, restart for the updater, and two exact URLs for the opener. TupleNest's own pg_* commands are Rust #[tauri::command]s registered in main.rs and are not ACL-gated here — nor are the two files the driver reads directly (a TLS CA and an SSH private key), which the user names in the connection form and which are read Rust-side, outside this scope. Said plainly because the previous wording ('every TupleNest command is explicitly listed; nothing broad is exposed') was not true of either.
